data.title: RED: Add eval test cases asserting MAX_AGENTS unlimited handling in sprint, debug-everything, fix-bug
data.description:
## Description

Add failing eval test cases to sprint, debug-everything, and fix-bug promptfooconfigs that assert the skills handle MAX_AGENTS: unlimited (no batch cap), MAX_AGENTS: 0 (skip dispatch), and no longer reference "5 sub-agents" or "batches of 5".

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml

### TDD requirement
Each new eval test case must FAIL against the current SKILL.md (RED), proving the behavioral change is detectable. Run: .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New eval test cases added to all 3 promptfooconfigs
  Verify: grep -q "unlimited" plugins/dso/skills/sprint/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Eval test cases FAIL against current (unmodified) SKILL.md files
  Verify: ! .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md 2>/dev/null
- [ ] All other existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
